action.reasoning: Observation: Best safe_follow_steps=90.5 (iter 14), last eval=86.88 (iter 24). Main bottleneck: robot can't maintain safe zone long enough. Analysis: 1) Angular gain too low to track moving human, 2) Mode switching at 2.0m boundary causes discontinuities, 3) Approach speed too conservative, 4) Stuck detection triggers even while turning. Decision: Write complete predict.py with higher angular gain (10.0), add near-zone (2.0-3.0m) smooth control, faster approach (1.0 at small angles), better stuck detection (only when facing), and submit eval immediately.
action.command: python train.py && python predict.py --data_path /data --checkpoint checkpoints/baseline --output out.json
